note: As-is baseline (0.22.1): gogo global opens ONE project's board. chooseBoard / globalBoard call NewProjectBoard(projs[0]) (first project only); m.project = projs[0], m.allProjects feeds only the header count + the config switcher. reload runs contract.LoadProject(m.project) aggregating that one project's sources. Feature carries Source + Root but NO Project field. Board p cycles the SOURCE chip within the focused project; cards + changelog show a single source dot. Header says 'N features (one project) . M projects (all)' - the mismatch the user sees. capBounce + watchDirs read m.sources() (focused project only). config tab p -> switchProject re-aggregates to another single project.

diagrams.title: Before: NewProjectBoard(projs[0]) -> LoadProject(one project) -> single-source-dot cards; board p cycles source; header count mismatch; cap/watch over focused project only
